title: TITLE X REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH WELL VISIT - 211info
text: ASHER COMMUNITY HEALTH CENTER TITLE X REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH WELL VISIT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Reproductive Health Well Visits include a full review of the patient’s medical history, a physical exam, and clinical screenings for cervical cancer (pap), chlamydia, gonorrhea, syphilis, HIV, and Hepatitis B and C. Health education and counseling is also available on topics including reproductive health, contraceptive methods, breast self-exams, STD/HIV risks, pregnancy counseling, infertility, and domestic and sexual violence. 712 Jay Street Fossil, OR 97830 Eligibility: US citizenship and Oregon residency are NOT required to receive services. Serves women with a household income below 250% FPL. Minors receiving confidential services do not need to report their parent’s income. Clients will not be denied service or subjected to any variation of services based on inability to pay. Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm, Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 763-2725 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 763-2725 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: None for those with income below 100% of the Federal Poverty Level (FPL). Sliding scale fees for those between 101-250% FPL. DOCUMENTS: Proof of income AREA SERVED: Wheeler County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm, Friday 8am-noon Services: Birth Control Counseling Contraception Emergency Contraception General Sexuality/Reproductive Health Education HIV Testing Pap Tests Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - HEALTH SERVICES SPECIALTY MEDICINE - DENTAL SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ASHER COMMUNITY HEALTH CENTER
